isi.lyrics:
Lyric KANG DANIEL - One Call Away

Romanization

I'm not afraid
honja namasseul ttae
I'll be okay
ama jogeum Insane
But don't worry bout me
ajikkajin mwo beotilmanhaji Oh
Still you know I'm a mess
(I'm a mess when i'm all alone)

gateun got dareun Time
ajikdo mot jeonhan mal
eodi itdeonji
geugosi eodideonji
yeonghwa gatatdeon
uriui sigan
I'm a minute away

So how am I supposed to sleep
son daeumyeon daeul su inneun geori

tonghwaeum neomeo eonjedeun yeogi
Just one call away my heart
Is on line one right now
So how am I supposed to sleep

gwaenchaneul ge
geokjeong an haedo dwae
da musihae
Forget the things I said
I been getting no sleep
aesseo ganghan cheok hajiman I'm too weak oh
Still you know I'm a mess

꿈만 같았던

웃어도 돼
내 모습에

My everything
You're everything to me

손 닿으면 닿을 수 있는 거리

isi.lyrics:
Lyric KANG DANIEL - Love Game

Romanization

Why we stuck in this love game
milgo danggida tto replay
da aneundedo noji mothae
We don’t even care

gakkeumeun numbitman bwado
I can tell what’s on your mind
malhaji anado
oneureun mwongga dalla boyeo

gwaenhi ttan yaegi kkeonaego
You smile, then stop mid-line
seoro da algo isseumyeonseo
moreuneun cheok, tto neomeoga

sonkkeuteun ajik neoinde
siseoneun jakku meoreojyeo
Don’t pretend you don’t feel it
ijjeumimyeon malhaejwo

Why we stuck in this love game
milgo danggida tto replay
da aneundedo noji mothae
We don’t even care who’s to blame

You drive me crazy, I light the flame
seororeul taeugo dasi fade
We fight, we hurt, we break, we make
We'll never stop playin this love game.

eojeneun tto gwaenchanatji
We were laughing all the time
ige mworago, haru mane
Feelings change like a flip of a dime

tuk deonjin mare jamkkan
ne pyojeongi heuryeojyeo
I didn’t mean to start a fire
geunde ne mameun imi meoreojyeo

unneun ge yejeomman mothae
pyojeong sok maldeuri boyeo
You can hide, but I still hear it
ijjeumimyeon malhaejwo

Why we stuck in this love game
milgo danggida tto replay
da aneundedo noji mothae
We don’t even care who’s to blame

You drive me crazy, I light the flame
seororeul taeugo dasi fade
We fight, we hurt, we break, we make
We'll never stop playin this love game.

eoseolpeun nongdam hanaro dasi gakkawojyeo
meoreojigien iksukhae

Why we stuck in this love game
milgo danggida tto replay
da aneundedo noji mothae

You drive me crazy, I light the flame
seororeul taeugo dasi fade
We fight, we hurt, we break, we make
We'll never stop playin this love game.

Hangeul

Why we stuck in this love game
밀고 당기다 또 replay
다 아는데도 놓지 못해
We don’t even care

가끔은 눈빛만 봐도
I can tell what’s on your mind
말하지 않아도
오늘은 뭔가 달라 보여

괜히 딴 얘기 꺼내고
You smile, then stop mid-line
서로 다 알고 있으면서
모르는 척, 또 넘어가

손끝은 아직 너인데
시선은 자꾸 멀어져
Don’t pretend you don’t feel it
이쯤이면 말해줘

Why we stuck in this love game
밀고 당기다 또 replay
다 아는데도 놓지 못해
We don’t even care who’s to blame

You drive me crazy, I light the flame
서로를 태우고 다시 fade
We fight, we hurt, we break, we make
We'll never stop playin this love game.

어제는 또 괜찮았지
We were laughing all the time
이게 뭐라고, 하루 만에
Feelings change like a flip of a dime

툭 던진 말에 잠깐
네 표정이 흐려져

웃는 게 예전만 못해
표정 속 말들이 보여
You can hide, but I still hear it
이쯤이면 말해줘

Why we stuck in this love game
밀고 당기다 또 replay
다 아는데도 놓지 못해
We don’t even care who’s to blame

You drive me crazy, I light the flame
서로를 태우고 다시 fade
We fight, we hurt, we break, we make
We'll never stop playin this love game.

어설픈 농담 하나로 다시 가까워져
멀어지기엔 익숙해

밀고 당기다 또 replay
다 아는데도 놓지 못해

You drive me crazy, I light the flame
